reviews.title: Perfect for school and work
reviews.review: Battery life has been excellent and it stays cool even after a full day of classes, docs, and video calls.

reviews.title: Fast and clean build quality
reviews.review: Very sharp screen and the chassis feels premium. I wish the webcam was a bit better, but performance has been great.

reviews.title: Worth it for everyday use
reviews.review: Quiet clicks, super comfortable, and switching between laptop and desktop has been smooth.

reviews.title: Camera is unreal
reviews.review: Low-light photos came out much better than my old phone and the battery still had plenty left at the end of the day.

reviews.title: Great for travel
reviews.review: The stand is more useful than I expected and the magnetic hold feels secure inside my bag.

reviews.title: Premium and reliable
reviews.review: Setup was easy, video recording is excellent, and the phone feels very polished overall.
